text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 29 

MDCD_IP_TOTAL_SPEND 

LABEL: Medicaid Payment Amount — Inpatient 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicaid payment amount from all Inpatient (IP) claims for the beneficiary 
during the year. Note that this dollar amount may be an undercount if the beneficiary had managed 
care claims. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Inpatient Claims File (derived) 

VALUES: $ 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable as
